home.metaDescription: NexAIpla — smart technology solutions for businesses in Cyprus and Greece. Online bookings, food orders, live shop traffic, DocsApp for local document AI, and tools that simplify your daily operations.
home.hero.title: Smart technology solutions for your business
home.hero.subtitle: NexAIpla builds apps for businesses in Cyprus and Greece — from online bookings to automated customer communication.
home.apps.title: Our apps
home.apps.subtitle: Choose the app that fits your needs — each solution is designed for specific business requirements.
apps.onlineBooking.title: Online Receptionist 24/7
apps.onlineBooking.description: Chat, QR code, and SMS confirmation and reminders. For appointment-based businesses — salons, clinics, medical offices, spas, gyms, repair shops, and more.
apps.shopTraffic.title: Live Business Traffic
apps.shopTraffic.description: Live view of foot traffic — shows customers how busy the shop is right now, without appointments. For barbershops, salons, pharmacies, cafés, and other walk-in businesses.
apps.foodOrder.title: Online Food Orders, Delivery & Kitchen
apps.foodOrder.description: Online takeaway & delivery orders with SMS, delivery map, and kitchen dashboard. For restaurants, grill shops, and delivery-only businesses.
apps.docsApp.title: Offline Private Document AI
apps.docsApp.description: Chat with your PDFs, Word, Excel, and scans on your PC — fully offline. No cloud, no internet. Charts, data analysis, and cited answers from your own files.
apps.customApps.title: Custom apps for your business
apps.customApps.description: Need a solution we don't offer yet? Tell us about your business — we can explore a custom app tailored to your requirements.
home.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
home.faq.subtitle: Quick answers about NexAIpla and how we work with businesses in Cyprus and Greece.
home.faq.a1: NexAIpla builds web apps for small and medium businesses — online appointment booking, food ordering, live shop traffic displays, and custom solutions tailored to your needs.
home.faq.a2: Salons, clinics, restaurants, barbershops, pharmacies, cafés, and other appointment-based or walk-in businesses in Cyprus and Greece.
home.faq.q3: Do I need technical knowledge to use your apps?
home.faq.a3: No. Our apps are designed for business owners and staff — simple dashboards, SMS links for customers, and no complex setup on your side.
home.faq.a4: Contact us via the form below or email info@nexaipla.com. We will discuss your business needs, show you a demo, and handle setup for you.
foodorder.metaDescription: Online food ordering for restaurants — takeaway & delivery with SMS confirmation, Google Maps delivery zones, kitchen dashboard, and driver board. Cyprus & Greece.
foodorder.hero.title: Online Food Orders, Delivery & Kitchen — with SMS confirmation
foodorder.hero.subtitle: Customers order from a bilingual menu, confirm via SMS, and track their order. Owners manage the kitchen live — no customer accounts required.
foodorder.problems.title: Problems it solves
foodorder.problems.subtitle: From phone chaos to a structured ordering flow — for customers, kitchen, and drivers.
foodorder.problems.p1.title: Phone-only orders, errors & waiting
foodorder.problems.p1.text: Structured online menu and checkout in a few steps — no hold music, no misheard items.
foodorder.problems.p2.title: Customers don't know order status
foodorder.problems.p2.text: SMS with a manage link — cancel, modify, or view history without calling back.
foodorder.problems.p3.title: Delivery zone uncertainty
foodorder.problems.p3.text: Google Maps pin and radius validation — customers know upfront if delivery is available.
foodorder.problems.p4.title: Kitchen chaos & driver coordination
foodorder.problems.p4.text: Live owner dashboard plus a separate driver board with SMS updates to customers.
foodorder.offerings.title: What it offers
foodorder.offerings.subtitle: Complete tools for every role in the ordering flow.
foodorder.offerings.o1.title: For customers
foodorder.offerings.o1.text: Bilingual menu (Greek/English), pickup or delivery, scheduled orders, cart with notes — no signup required.
foodorder.offerings.o2.title: For owners
foodorder.offerings.o2.text: Live order queue, KPIs, shop closures, emergency bulk cancel, and settings — access via secure link, no password.
foodorder.offerings.o3.title: For drivers
foodorder.offerings.o3.text: Dedicated delivery board: ready → on the way (SMS + ETA) → done. Separate signed link from the owner dashboard.
foodorder.features.title: Why choose it
foodorder.features.subtitle: Built for restaurants in Cyprus and Greece — fast to deploy, easy for customers.
foodorder.features.f1.title: No customer accounts
foodorder.features.f1.text: Access via SMS links — zero friction for the customer, no passwords to remember.
foodorder.features.f2.title: Cyprus & Greece ready
foodorder.features.f2.text: Per-country settings (VAT, timezone), Greek and English UI, Greece and Cyprus mobile support.
foodorder.features.f3.title: Fast per-restaurant setup
foodorder.features.f3.text: One deployment per restaurant — full data isolation, Vercel + Postgres, ready in under an hour.
foodorder.screenshots.title: Take a look
foodorder.screenshots.subtitle: From the customer menu to the kitchen dashboard and SMS notifications.
foodorder.screenshots.menu.caption: Customer menu & cart
foodorder.screenshots.menu.alt: Bilingual food ordering menu with cart
foodorder.screenshots.dashboard.caption: Kitchen dashboard
foodorder.screenshots.dashboard.alt: Live order queue with status management and KPIs
foodorder.screenshots.sms.caption: SMS confirmation & delivery
foodorder.screenshots.sms.alt: SMS order confirmation with manage link and delivery ETA
foodorder.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
foodorder.faq.subtitle: Common questions about online food ordering for restaurants in Cyprus and Greece.
foodorder.faq.a1: No. Customers order from a bilingual menu and receive an SMS with a manage link — no accounts, no passwords.
foodorder.faq.q2: Is it ready for Cyprus and Greece?
foodorder.faq.a2: Yes. It supports per-country settings (VAT, timezone), Greece and Cyprus mobile numbers, and a Greek/English interface.
foodorder.faq.a3: Each restaurant gets its own deployment with full data isolation. Setup typically takes under an hour once your menu is ready.
foodorder.faq.q4: Does it support both takeaway and delivery?
foodorder.faq.a4: Yes. Customers can choose pickup or delivery, with Google Maps pin validation for delivery zones, a kitchen dashboard, and a separate driver board.
booking.metaTitle: Online Appointment Booking — Cyprus & Greece | Chat & SMS
booking.metaDescription: Online appointment booking with chat, QR code, and SMS confirmation. For appointment-based businesses in Cyprus and Greece: salons, clinics, medical offices, spas, gyms, and more.
booking.hero.title: Online bookings for appointment-based businesses
booking.hero.subtitle: For salons, clinics, medical offices, spas, gyms, and any business that works with appointments. Chat, QR code, and SMS confirmation.
booking.demo.title: See how it works
booking.demo.subtitle: A quick walkthrough of the booking flow — from chat to SMS confirmation and reminders.
booking.demo.noVideo: Your browser does not support video.
booking.demo.placeholderText: Replace the placeholder by adding your video to the public/landing/ folder.
booking.benefits.title: Why choose it
booking.benefits.subtitle: Fewer phone calls, more appointments — for you and your customers.
booking.benefits.b1.title: Fast booking without phone calls
booking.benefits.b1.text: Chat UI, service, staff, and time selection in a few steps — no waiting on hold.
booking.benefits.b2.title: SMS confirmation, reminders & management
booking.benefits.b2.text: Confirmation, reminders, cancellation, or rescheduling via a link you receive by SMS.
booking.benefits.b3.title: Dashboard for your business
booking.benefits.b3.text: Appointment board, KPIs, reminders, and sync with Google Calendar.
booking.screenshots.title: Take a look
booking.screenshots.subtitle: From the customer experience to your business management tools.
booking.screenshots.chat.caption: Booking chat interface
booking.screenshots.chat.alt: Chat screen for online appointment booking
booking.screenshots.dashboard.caption: Business dashboard
booking.screenshots.dashboard.alt: Control panel with appointments and KPIs
booking.screenshots.sms.caption: SMS confirmation & reminder
booking.screenshots.sms.alt: SMS confirmation and reminder message with appointment management link
booking.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
booking.faq.subtitle: Common questions about online appointment booking with SMS.
booking.faq.q1: What types of businesses is this for?
booking.faq.a1: Any business that works with appointments — salons, barbershops, clinics, medical offices, spas, gyms, repair shops, and similar services.
booking.faq.q2: Do customers need to create an account?
booking.faq.a2: No. Customers book via chat or QR code and manage their appointment through a link sent by SMS — no passwords or sign-up required.
booking.faq.q3: How do SMS confirmations and reminders work?
booking.faq.a3: After booking, the customer receives an SMS with a confirmation link. Reminders are sent automatically before the appointment. Customers can cancel or reschedule from the same link.
booking.faq.q4: Can it sync with Google Calendar?
booking.faq.a4: Yes. The business dashboard supports Google Calendar sync so your team sees appointments alongside your existing schedule.
custom.metaTitle: Custom Business Apps — Cyprus & Greece | NexAIpla
custom.metaDescription: Custom web apps for businesses in Cyprus and Greece — dashboards, automation, internal tools, and solutions tailored to your requirements.
custom.hero.title: Custom apps built for your business
custom.hero.subtitle: Need something beyond our ready-made products? Tell us your requirements — we design and build bespoke web applications.
custom.process.title: How we work
custom.process.subtitle: From first conversation to delivery — a simple, transparent process.
custom.process.s1.title: 1. Discovery
custom.process.s1.text: You describe your business, the problem, and what you want to achieve. Together we define the core requirements.
custom.process.s2.title: 2. Proposal & design
custom.process.s2.text: We present a proposed solution, key features, and timeline — before development starts.
custom.process.s3.title: 3. Build & deliver
custom.process.s3.text: We build the app, show you a demo, make adjustments, and hand over a ready-to-use solution.
custom.examples.title: What we can build
custom.examples.subtitle: Examples of custom apps for businesses in Cyprus and Greece.
custom.examples.e1.title: Dashboards & internal tools
custom.examples.e1.text: Control panels, data management, reports, and team tools — tailored to your workflow.
custom.examples.e2.title: Automation & notifications
custom.examples.e2.text: SMS, email, webhooks, automated flows, and integration with existing tools (e.g. Google Calendar, POS).
custom.examples.e3.title: Specialised business flows
custom.examples.e3.text: Forms, workflows, clients/suppliers, inventory, booking extensions — anything our ready-made products don't cover.
custom.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
custom.faq.subtitle: Answers about custom business applications.
custom.faq.q1: How is this different from your ready-made products?
custom.faq.a1: Ready-made products (bookings, food orders, shop traffic) cover specific needs. Custom is for unique requirements that don't fit those templates.
custom.faq.q2: How much does a custom app cost?
custom.faq.a2: It depends on complexity. After our discussion we provide a quote with a clear cost range — no commitment at the start.
custom.faq.a3: Simple apps may be ready in a few weeks. Larger projects take longer — the timeline is agreed before we start.
custom.faq.a4: Send us a message via the contact form or email info@nexaipla.com. Describe your business and goals — we reply within 24 hours.

app.title: Live Business Traffic
app.tagline: Live business traffic for walk-in shops — without appointments.
waitless.metaTitle: Live Business Traffic — live shop traffic status
waitless.metaDescription: Live shop traffic without appointments — show customers how busy you are right now. For barbershops, salons, pharmacies, cafés, and walk-in businesses in Cyprus and Greece.
waitless.heroHeadline: Know how busy it is—before you leave.
waitless.heroLead: Shows customers how busy the business is right now — and when you are open. Ideal for barbershops, salons, pharmacies, cafés, and other walk-in businesses.
waitless.pillarCustomerBlurb: Public page with live wait levels, hours, and announcements.
waitless.pillarOwnerBlurb: Private dashboard — one tap to update traffic for walk-ins.
waitless.pillarPricingBlurb: €30 setup, €25/month, or 10% off the subscription when you pay annually.
waitless.heroSub: Without appointments — people simply see the real picture before they head out.
waitless.ownerNote: Owners use a private, secure link (not a public customer login). Open the link you were given — it is not listed on this page.
waitless.customerIntro: Each shop has a public page (for example /shop/your-shop-name). There you will find:
waitless.customer.b1: Live traffic / wait with four clear levels (colour-coded): about 0–10 min, 10–20, 20–40, 45+ minutes, with plain labels like “immediate”, “short wait”, and so on.
waitless.customer.b2: Open or closed using your real hours, special closed days, and optional emergency close — shown as “temporarily closed” when the owner turns it on.
waitless.customer.b3: Hours: today, weekly plan, and special closed days.
waitless.customer.b6: Automatic refresh about every 15–20 seconds — no WebSockets.
waitless.customer.b7: A browser notification when the wait level changes (where the browser allows it).
waitless.customer.b8: PWA: add to home screen, built mobile-first.
waitless.levelsCaption: The four wait levels in the app
waitless.ownerIntro: Private dashboard, separate from the customer page:
waitless.owner.b1: Sign-in via a secure long-lived opaque link (on the order of ~90 days) — access is defined by that link, not a shared public login.
waitless.owner.b2: One tap to update traffic: four buttons (LOW / MEDIUM / BUSY / VERY BUSY) matching the colours and wait ranges customers see.
waitless.owner.b4: Announcements plus emergency close / reopen from the same area.
waitless.owner.b5: Settings such as default shop language and idle / auto-downgrade options where they apply.
waitless.owner.b6: PWA for owners: home-screen shortcuts for quick status updates.
waitless.owner.b7: Offline: queue failed updates and retry when you are back online.
waitless.whyNot.p1: Booking answers “do I have a slot?”. Live Business Traffic answers “how busy is it right now?” — that is what walk-in clients usually care about.
waitless.whyNot.p2: It sets expectations without promising a chair at an exact minute, and it fits shops where people drop in or queues shift fast.
waitless.whyNot.p3: It complements how many walk-in businesses already work — without appointments, and does not replace bookings if you still need them.
waitless.pwa.p1: Customers and owners get a mobile-first layout. On supported phones you can install the app to the home screen like a light native app.
waitless.pwa.p2: Owners can jump in, tap a traffic level, and leave — ideal between clients.
waitless.smart.p1: Stale warning if traffic has not been updated for a while (configurable).
waitless.smart.p2: Automatic downgrade from “very busy” after a set time (production cron) so the board does not stay red forever by mistake.
waitless.pricingIntro: Per shop. Prices do not include VAT.
waitless.pricingAnnualDesc: 10% off the subscription when billed annually (vs €25 × 12). The €30 installation is separate, charged once.
waitless.contactIntro: Want to see if Live Business Traffic fits your business? Get in touch.
waitless.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
waitless.faq.subtitle: Answers about live shop traffic for walk-in businesses.
waitless.faq.a1: Yes. It is designed for shops without appointments — barbershops, salons, pharmacies, cafés, and similar walk-in businesses.
waitless.faq.q2: How do customers see traffic levels?
waitless.faq.a2: Each shop has a public page with colour-coded wait levels, opening hours, announcements, and automatic refresh — in Greek and English.
waitless.faq.q3: How does the owner update traffic?
waitless.faq.a3: Through a private owner screen with a personal link — four buttons for wait level, no shared password.
waitless.faq.a4: No. It answers a different question — "how busy is it right now?" rather than "what time is my appointment?". It can work alongside online booking.
docsapp.metaTitle: Offline Private Document AI — Windows | No Internet Required
docsapp.metaDescription: Offline Private Document AI for Windows. Chat with PDFs, Word, Excel, and scans — charts, data analysis, and cited answers. Greek & English OCR. No cloud, no internet.
docsapp.hero.title: Offline Private Document AI
docsapp.hero.subtitle: Chat with your PDFs, Word, Excel, and scans on your PC — fully offline. No cloud, no internet. Charts, data analysis, and cited answers from your own files.
docsapp.problems.title: Problems it solves
docsapp.problems.subtitle: From document chaos to instant, private answers — fully offline, with no internet required.
docsapp.problems.p1.title: Cloud and internet privacy
docsapp.problems.p1.text: Sensitive contracts, invoices, and client files stay on your computer. No cloud, no internet — nothing sent to third-party AI services.
docsapp.problems.p2.title: Finding info buried in PDFs
docsapp.problems.p2.text: Search across dozens of documents with natural-language questions — get cited answers instead of manual scrolling.
docsapp.problems.p3.title: Scattered files and formats
docsapp.problems.p3.text: PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, images, and text in one inbox — extracted, indexed, and ready to query.
docsapp.problems.p4.title: Manual reading and data analysis
docsapp.problems.p4.text: One-click summaries, folder-scoped Q&A, charts, and data analysis — so you focus on decisions, not page-by-page reading or spreadsheet wrangling.
docsapp.features.title: Main capabilities
docsapp.features.subtitle: Built for professionals who need private, offline document intelligence on Windows — including charts and data analysis.
docsapp.features.f1.title: Document intake
docsapp.features.f1.text: Drop PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, images, and text files into an inbox. The app extracts text and generates review-ready note stubs automatically.
docsapp.features.f2.title: Grounded Q&A (RAG)
docsapp.features.f2.text: Ask questions over your ingested files and get cited answers. If the answer is not in your documents, the assistant says so — no guessing.
docsapp.features.f3.title: Local chat UI
docsapp.features.f3.text: A ChatGPT-style web interface on your PC — general local AI chat plus folder-scoped document Q&A with streaming responses.
docsapp.features.f4.title: Smart extraction & OCR
docsapp.features.f4.text: Handles digital PDFs, tables as markdown, and scanned PDFs or images via Tesseract OCR — Greek and English supported.
docsapp.features.f5.title: Project folders
docsapp.features.f5.text: Organize documents in sidebar folders (up to 2 levels). Upload, move, rename files, and scope Q&A to one project at a time.
docsapp.features.f6.title: Summaries & history
docsapp.features.f6.text: One-click document summaries, saved chat threads with multi-tab support, and automatic cleanup after 6 months.
docsapp.features.f7.title: Charts & data analysis
docsapp.features.f7.text: Create charts and visualizations from spreadsheet data, and analyze numbers in your documents — all locally, without internet.
docsapp.requirements.title: System requirements & setup
docsapp.requirements.subtitle: DocsApp runs entirely on your Windows PC — here is what you need to get started.
docsapp.requirements.r3: Ollama (local LLM runtime) with recommended models: qwen2.5:14b, nomic-embed-text, llama3.1:8b
docsapp.requirements.r4: Optional: Tesseract OCR for scanned PDFs and images (Greek + English)
docsapp.requirements.s1: Create a Python virtual environment and install dependencies
docsapp.requirements.s2: Install Ollama and pull the required models
docsapp.requirements.s3: Run document intake to process files from the inbox folder
docsapp.requirements.s4: Start the chat UI server and open http://127.0.0.1:8080 in your browser
docsapp.requirements.s5: Drop files, organize folders, create charts, and start asking questions — all locally, without internet
docsapp.screenshots.title: Take a look
docsapp.screenshots.subtitle: Screenshots coming soon — placeholder previews of the DocsApp interface.
docsapp.screenshots.inbox.caption: Document inbox
docsapp.screenshots.chat.caption: Chat & Q&A
docsapp.screenshots.folders.caption: Project folders
docsapp.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
docsapp.faq.subtitle: Common questions about DocsApp — local, offline document AI for Windows.
docsapp.faq.a1: No. DocsApp runs entirely offline on your Windows PC using local Ollama models. Your files, embeddings, and conversations stay on your machine — no cloud, no internet required.
docsapp.faq.a2: PDF, Word (DOCX), Excel (XLSX), CSV, plain text, markdown, and images. Scanned PDFs and images are processed with Tesseract OCR when installed. Excel and CSV data can also be used for charts and analysis.
docsapp.faq.q3: What do I need to run DocsApp?
docsapp.faq.a3: Windows 10 or 11, Python 3.10+, and Ollama with the recommended models. Optional Tesseract for OCR. No GPU or Docker required — CPU-only setup.
docsapp.faq.a4: Yes. The chat UI supports Greek and English, and Tesseract OCR handles Greek and English scanned documents. The interface includes Greek labels for folders and history.
